replies.msg:
Cap. 159 LEGAL PRACTITIONERS ORDINANCE

“solicitor” (律師) means a person who is enrolled on the roll of solicitors and who, at the material time, is not suspended from practice.

quote.msg:
Cap. 159 LEGAL PRACTITIONERS ORDINANCE

“solicitor” (律師) means a person who is enrolled on the roll of solicitors and who, at the material time, is not suspended from practice.

replies.msg:
46. Penalty for pretending to be a solicitor, etc.

(1) Any unqualified person who wilfully pretends to be, or takes or uses any name, title, addition or description implying that he is qualified or recognized by law as qualified to act as, a solicitor shall be guilty of an offence and shall be liable on summary conviction to a fine of $500,000.
小朋友小心啲講野!
有無床單？

quote.msg:
Cap. 159 LEGAL PRACTITIONERS ORDINANCE

“solicitor” (律師) means a person who is enrolled on the roll of solicitors and who, at the material time, is not suspended from practice.

46. Penalty for pretending to be a solicitor, etc.

(1) Any unqualified person who wilfully pretends to be, or takes or uses any name, title, addition or description implying that he is qualified or recognized by law as qualified to act as, a solicitor shall be guilty of an offence and shall be liable on summary conviction to a fine of $500,000.

可唔可以具體d講下你係上市部工作做咩？
通常幾點收工？同事關係如何？

quote.msg:
可唔可以具體d講下你係上市部工作做咩？
通常幾點收工？同事關係如何？

replies.msg:
幫手寫招股書，做招股書驗証，幫保薦人做盡職調查，答聯交所Q，起草基石投資者協議，承銷協議。

睇deal走。當準備入表或者大量印刷招股書之前同常都要熬夜。空閒果陣7-8點都可以走。

50%大陸同事，50%香港人。同事都幾nice (但係都係睇firm culture)。

replies.msg:
做transactional work 一定無做 liti 咁legal / academic。 但係都要識嘢，知個客間公司做咩，熟Listing Rules/Takeovers Code，交咩比聯交所等等。

個人認為M&A都唔係特別intellectual。寫份SPA都係搵個precedent再跟番個客specific需求改。

短時間內唔認為AI會取代律師（除非係啲好repetitive/routine嘅嘢，例如係想租層樓想要份standard tenancy agreement)。一黎啲客想有個真人係到為求個安心，二黎每個客嘅需求都唔一樣，好多時都要律師個人判斷。 但係聽講依家啲big data好勁，可以集合曬之前啲案例再即刻比個legal opinikn，所以都唔係無可能。
